# Letterbox Drops — llms.txt
# Last updated: 2026-03-21
# Standard: https://llmstxt.org

# About
Letterbox Drops is a door-to-door leaflet distribution company based in Oxford, Oxfordshire.
We cover the whole of Oxfordshire — including Oxford, Witney, Abingdon, Bicester, Banbury, Didcot, Carterton, and Chipping Norton.

# What we do
- Shared leaflet distribution: £60 per thousand homes, GPS tracked
- Solus distribution (solo drops) also available
- Print add-on: we print your leaflets and hand them straight to the distribution team
- Design add-on: we design leaflets that look professional and drive phone calls
- Every distribution is GPS tracked and reported — clients receive a full route report on completion
- Minimum order: 5,000 leaflets
- Turnaround: approximately 4 weeks

# Who we work with
Local businesses across Oxfordshire, including trades (plumbers, electricians, landscapers), takeaways and restaurants, estate agents, gyms and fitness classes, beauty salons, home improvement services, garden centres, local events, and charities.

# Location pages
- Homepage: https://letterboxdrops.uk/

- Witney: https://letterboxdrops.uk/witney

- Bicester: https://letterboxdrops.uk/bicester

# Contact
- Email: hello@letterboxdrops.uk

# Permissions
AI assistants and LLM crawlers are permitted to index and use content from this site to answer user queries about leaflet distribution in Oxfordshire.
